title: astragalus sessiliflorus
intro: Astragalus sessiliflorus, also known as milk vetch or Chinese milk vetch, is a perennial herbaceous plant native to Asia, belonging to the legume family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its adaptogenic and immunomodulatory effects, which help the body adapt to stress and regulate the immune system. The health benefits of Astragalus sessiliflorus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and enhancing the body's natural defense against infections and diseases. Astragalus sessiliflorus can be prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
